message:
🌱 Add atlantis: intermittent 404 Not Found on /pulls github calls mission (#1167)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "atlantis-1905-intermittent-404-not-found-on-pulls-github-calls",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "atlantis: intermittent 404 Not Found on /pulls github calls",
+    "description": "intermittent 404 Not Found on /pulls github calls. This issue affects 20+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify atlantis troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your atlantis deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review atlantis configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis\n```\n### Community Note\n\n* Please vote on this issue by adding a 👍 [reaction](https://blog.github.com/2016-03-10-add-reactions-to-pull-requests-issues-and-comments/) to the original issue to help the community and maintainers prioritize this request."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for intermittent 404 Not Found on /pulls github calls",
+        "description": "Similar to #1131, we see this for /files/ too, resulting in a plan\nerror.\n```yaml\nrepo-allowlist: github.com/myorg/myrepo\n    allow-fork-prs: true\n\n    default-tf-version: 0.13.7\n\n    # See https://www.runatlantis.io/docs/checkout-strategy.html#merge\n    checkout-strategy: merge\n\n    gh-user: xxx\n\n    data-dir: /atlantis\n    atlantis-url: http://yyy\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm intermittent 404 Not Found on /pulls github calls is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Similar to #1131, we see this for /files/ too, resulting in a plan\nerror.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "repo-allowlist: github.com/myorg/myrepo\n    allow-fork-prs: true\n\n    default-tf-version: 0.13.7\n\n    # See https://www.runatlantis.io/docs/checkout-strategy.html#merge\n    checkout-strategy: merge\n\n    gh-user: xxx\n\n    data-dir: /atlantis\n    atlantis-url: http://yyy",
+        "version: 3\nautomerge: true\ndelete_source_branch_on_merge: true\nprojects:\n- dir: mydir1\n  terraform_version: v0.13.7\n  autoplan:\n    when_modified: [\"**\", \"../modules/**.tf\"]\n    enabled: true\n- dir: mydir2\n  autoplan:\n    enabled: false",
+        "- name: ATLANTIS_PORT\n      value: \"4141\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "atlantis",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "atlantis"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/1905",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/pull/2002"
+    },
+    "reactions": 20,
+    "comments": 9,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-15T06:32:27.529Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
